meta.rationale: track_robot_and_box_multicam.py applies T_OBB_TO_BODY (= inverse of largebox.xml inertial.quat) before publishing obj_quat_*, so the CSV poses are already in mjlab AABB body frame. The residual rotation observed at step 2 (~9 deg in this calibration) is attributed primarily to operator-side box placement error rather than a fixed convention mismatch. Re-run a dedicated multi-orientation calibration only if the policy fails to track the object at deploy.
meta.applies_to: object_R_lab from tracker -> object_R_sim via R_sim = (T_sim_lab.R @ object_R_lab) @ R_obj_tag
meta.convention: R_obj_tag is right-multiplied on the body-frame rotation.
